docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2014 CONTINUED TO MAY-20-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-28-2014 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-28-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM AS TO DEFENDANT WEISS, CLIFFORD M. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-04-2013
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEGALMATCH.COM SERVED MAY-09-2013, MAIL AND ACKNOWLEDGEMENT, ACKNOWLEDGMENT DATE MAY-14-2013 AS TO DEFENDANT WEISS, CLIFFORD M.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-20-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
